theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Fits the authority and clarity needed for an ATS and job board, ensuring high legibility for text-dense resumes. Indian neo-brutalism/fintech style (Razorpay/CRED-esque but distinctly sharper) gives it a highly trustworthy and 'fast' feel without feeling childish.

rules: NO generic purple/violet gradients. NO muddy gradients.
Strict high-contrast: Dark text on light backgrounds or white text on dark #0D0D12.
Tint neutral greys slightly with cool blue for a crisp corporate feel.
Avoid 'SaaS Blue' - use stark black, white, and signal orange.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Headings: tracking-tight, leading-none. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for high-impact punch.
Body: 'Outfit' for maximum legibility in resumes and job descriptions.
H1 max size is text-5xl to text-6xl. Do not use 8xl.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous paddings (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: max 4px (rounded-sm) for a sharp, technical, and fast feel. No overly bubbly borders.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use 'Control Room' grid (tight gap-4) for dashboards. Use 'Tetris' grid (wide gap-8) for marketing sections.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have generous internal padding.
Do not center-everything. Use asymmetrical alignments.
Align text left for dense job descriptions and resume text.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft minimal shadows (shadow-sm) combined with crisp 1px borders for dashboards. No heavy neumorphism.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #0D0D12 or #E5E7EB. Expose the grid skeleton in dashboard views (border-collapse look).
visual_enhancers.animations: Snappy, fast micro-interactions. Fast page loads (<2s perception). Avoid slow fades.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, technical dashboard needs.

components_strategy.marketing: Custom HTML + Tailwind. Break the standard grid.
components_strategy.app_dashboard: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Cardless where possible; use 1px borders instead of floating floating-island cards.
components_strategy.charts: Chart.js as requested. Keep colors high contrast (Black, Orange, Green).
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='apply-job-button', data-testid='kanban-column-applied').

landing_page.hero: H1 'Build ATS Resume. Find Jobs. Get Hired. All in One Place.' Solid white bg, striking orange CTA. overlapping geometric UI elements.
landing_page.trust_bar: Includes 'PayUmoney secured · No hidden charges · Used by 200+ colleges · Cancel anytime'. Display college logos.
landing_page.pricing: 4 jobseeker plans (Free, Resume Pro ₹149/mo, Job Seeker Pro ₹249/mo, Combo Pro ₹299/mo), 3 employer plans. Tiered cards. Month/Year toggle.

builder.layout: Split-screen layout. Left: Forms (Shadcn customized). Right: Live A4 preview of resume.
builder.features: Drag-drop reordering, ATS gauge, Keyword match panel, 5 template picker visible, Export PDF button.

job_board.layout: Left sidebar for filters. Right grid for job cards. Badges for 'Featured'.

dashboards.employer: Job listings table, applicant management Kanban, analytics.
dashboards.admin: Overview charts (revenue/signups via Chart.js), tables for users/resumes/jobs, payment history, setting editors, activity logs.

header.features: Hinglish toggle button prominently displayed, User/Role selection.

media_urls.description: Abstract white geometric architecture for the hero section background to convey structure and building.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON carefully. Use ONLY the media URLs provided here. NO Placeholders.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Do NOT invent new classes.
Implement all designs using Javascript (.js/.jsx) NOT TypeScript (.tsx) based on system hints.
Install and use Phosphor icons: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Install fonts via Fontsource: yarn add @fontsource/cabinet-grotesk @fontsource/outfit
Ensure Chart.js is integrated exactly as requested (yarn add chart.js react-chartjs-2).
Ensure ALL interactive elements and major UI sections have data-testid attributes for testing.
Ensure Shadcn UI components are stripped of their default soft borders and match this sharp 4px radius high-contrast aesthetic.
Implement the Hinglish toggle in the header.
For the Kanban application tracker, prioritize standard HTML5 drag-and-drop or a simple library like dnd-kit or react-beautiful-dnd.
